definitions.text: i fekting: rask vending for å unngå støt
definitions.translation: in fencing: quick turn to avoid a blow

definitions.text: stup med forlengs eller baklengs helvending av kroppen
definitions.translation: dive with a forward backward somersault of the body

definitions.text: i gymnastikk: sidelengs sprang over hest
definitions.translation: in gymnastics: sideways jump over a horse

definitions.text: i dressurridning: det å styre hest i ring, for eksempel med tømme som en trener holder i sentrum
definitions.translation: in dressage riding: guiding a horse in a circle, with reins held by a trainer in the center
